name: Silicon Touch Technology Inc.
summary: Silicon Touch Technology Inc. designs, develops, produces, and sells analogue and digital ICs. The company offers motor, brushless fan motor, CD/DVD ROM motor, stepping motor, and LED display driving IC, as well as power and power supply monitoring, optoelectronic communication and image processing, and optoelectronic interface ICs. It provides its products in the Americas, Europe, Japan, Korea, South Africa, and China. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.
